title: Biochemists and Biophysicists
description: Study the chemical composition or physical principles of living cells and organisms, their electrical and mechanical energy, and related phenomena. May conduct research to further understanding of the complex chemical combinations and reactions involved in metabolism, reproduction, growth, and heredity. May determine the effects of foods, drugs, serums, hormones, and other substances on tissues and vital processes of living organisms.

tasks.text: Share research findings by writing scientific articles or by making presentations at scientific conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach or advise undergraduate or graduate students or supervise their research.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study physical principles of living cells or organisms and their electrical or mechanical energy, applying methods and knowledge of mathematics, physics, chemistry, or biology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage laboratory teams or monitor the quality of a team's work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop new methods to study the mechanisms of biological processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write grant proposals to obtain funding for research.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design or perform experiments with equipment, such as lasers, accelerators, or mass spectrometers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine the three-dimensional structure of biological macromolecules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design or build laboratory equipment needed for special research projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports or recommendations, based upon research outcomes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study spatial configurations of submicroscopic molecules, such as proteins, using x-rays or electron microscopes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study the chemistry of living processes, such as cell development, breathing and digestion, or living energy changes, such as growth, aging, or death.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study the mutations in organisms that lead to cancer or other diseases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research the chemical effects of substances, such as drugs, serums, hormones, or food, on tissues or vital processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research transformations of substances in cells, using atomic isotopes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or execute tests to detect diseases, genetic disorders, or other abnormalities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or test new drugs or medications intended for commercial distribution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Isolate, analyze, or synthesize vitamins, hormones, allergens, minerals, or enzymes and determine their effects on body functions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine the molecular or chemical aspects of immune system functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research how characteristics of plants or animals are carried through successive generations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare pharmaceutical compounds for commercial distribution.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop methods to process, store, or use foods, drugs, or chemical compounds.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate the nature, composition, or expression of genes or research how genetic engineering can impact these processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Produce pharmaceutically or industrially useful proteins, using recombinant DNA technology.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
